name: Takara Standard Co.,Ltd.
summary: Takara Standard Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells enameled products. The company offers enameled system kitchens, wood system kitchens, enamel system baths, enameled washstands, sink units, heating appliances, hot water heaters, enameled wall covering materials, and other home appliances and equipment. It primarily sells its products through a network of 172 showrooms in Japan. The company was formerly known as Nippon Enamel Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takara Standard Co.,Ltd. in 1971. Takara Standard Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1912 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
